recommendations.title: Dogville
recommendations.overview: A woman on the run from the mob is reluctantly accepted in a small Colorado community in exchange for labor, but when a search visits the town, she learns that their support has a price.

recommendations.title: Melancholia
recommendations.overview: Two sisters find their already strained relationship challenged as a mysterious new planet threatens to collide with Earth.

recommendations.title: The Idiots
recommendations.overview: A group of people gather at a Copenhagen suburban home to break all the limitations and to bring out the 'inner idiot' in themselves.

recommendations.title: The House That Jack Built
recommendations.overview: Failed architect, engineer and vicious murderer Jack narrates the details of some of his most elaborately orchestrated crimes, each of them a towering piece of art that defines his life's work as a serial killer for twelve years.

recommendations.title: Breaking the Waves
recommendations.overview: In a small, conservative Scottish village, an oilman is paralyzed in an accident. His wife, who prayed for his return, feels guilty; even more, when he urges her to have sex with another.

recommendations.title: Dancer in the Dark
recommendations.overview: Selma, a Czech immigrant on the verge of blindness, struggles to make ends meet for herself and her son, who has inherited the same genetic disorder and will suffer the same fate without an expensive operation. When life gets too difficult, Selma lea

recommendations.title: Nymphomaniac: Vol. II
recommendations.overview: The continuation of Joe's sexually dictated life delves into the darker aspects of her adult life and what led to her being in Seligman's care.

recommendations.title: Epidemic
recommendations.overview: A director and screenwriter pen a script and, in the process, blur the line between fiction and reality.

recommendations.title: Antichrist
recommendations.overview: A grieving couple retreats to their cabin 'Eden' in the woods, hoping to repair their broken hearts and troubled marriage. But nature takes its course and things go from bad to worse.

recommendations.title: Nymphomaniac: Vol. I
